hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into a unified intake workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports risk-based decisions across customer profiles and regulatory rules.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Customer intake depends on disconnected checks
problem_description: Onboarding teams struggle with fragmented KYC and KYB outputs scattered across multiple providers. This fragmentation creates manual delays, inconsistent risk reviews and gaps in audit evidence for digital asset compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity, company and screening provider outputs into one structured onboarding workflow that routes reviews, applies risk rules and preserves audit evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs with risk-based routing, case reviews, approval decisions and audit evidence to structure customer onboarding workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond disconnected checks. One onboarding layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows, risk-based reviews, case evidence and audit-ready decisions without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in structuring customer intake with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment control from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support structured customer onboarding workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC and KYB checks connect to onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding evidence supports audit-ready compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how risk rules guide onboarding decisions and case routing
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams with a connected platform that connects KYC, KYB, sanctions, and risk data into structured onboarding and review workflows for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support customer onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures customer intake by orchestrating identity, corporate, sanctions, and risk checks into policy-driven, auditable workflows with risk-based routing and case creation for efficient compliance review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by recording provider outputs, reviewer decisions, case histories and audit logs to support traceability and review readiness for compliance and regulatory purposes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, allowing clients to combine outputs into a single operational workflow without replacing existing tools or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers; it operates as a control layer that connects and structures their outputs into consistent, auditable compliance workflows.
final_title: Structure customer onboarding into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into risk-based, audit-ready onboarding workflows with structured decisions and evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
